text:
Guidepost (, rom. Gaido Posuto) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. When cast, it reveals the location of a restricted card of the caster's choice, except for #000.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This spell allows the caster to discover the location where a specific restricted card can be obtained, with the exception of #000. It is necessary to know the desired card's number to designate it as the target. "Guidepost" is very useful to players who do not currently have any idea of how to obtain one of the specified slot cards.

Trivia

This card is mentioned three times in Chapter 151 (four if the list of cards in Team Gon's possession is included).
This card is mentioned in Chapter 152 when Bara states that it allowed his team to discover the location of "Plot of Beach" and "Wild Luck Alexandrite".
In Chapter 154, Amana also used this card to identify the location of the "Plot of Beach".
